name: Athletic Diagonal
description: Performance hero. Athlete in motion cuts diagonally bottom-left to top-right. Headline anchored bottom-left, brand wordmark top-left, optional product callout bottom-right.
gen_directive: Composition: an athlete in motion cuts diagonally across the frame from bottom-left to top-right (running, jumping, mid-strike). The bottom-left corner area must be visually quiet to host a 2-line all-caps headline. The top-left corner must be quiet for a brand wordmark. Single dominant brand color flooded as a triangular wedge from one corner (red, yellow, electric blue). Subject duotone or dramatic single-source rim-lighting against a dark or moody background. Aggressive, kinetic.
placement_hint: This image was composed to the 'Athletic Diagonal' template. The headline lives in the bottom-left area (roughly x=0.04, y=0.65, w=0.50, h=0.25), left-aligned, all-caps, 2 lines max. font_size_pct around 8-10. Tight line-height. Use white text with a moderate dark halo scrim if the underlying area has any texture. The headline must align with the diagonal energy — never extend past the visual midline.
